name: com.unity.ide.ai
description: AI code editor integration for supporting Cursor/Qoder/Codium/Trae/Antigravity as code editor for Unity. Adds support for generating csproj files for intellisense purposes, auto discovery of installations, etc.
author: JupiterTheWarlock

_upm.changelog:
Integration:

- Add Trae IDE support with reuse window option
- Add Google Antigravity IDE support
